document.name: Varfok Kávézó
document.shortDescription: Hillside café on Varfok utca — espresso and cakes in the Tabán lanes below the Castle.
document.longDescription:
Varfok Kávézó on Varfok utca is a neighborhood coffee stop climbing from Tabán toward the Castle District. Homemade cakes and filter coffee suit morning walks on the Buda slopes. Hours on varfokkavezo.hu.

Sources: https://www.varfokkavezo.hu/
